instructions: This is a greenfield Swift/SwiftUI + small Node WebUI project. Do NOT suggest backward-compatibility shims, legacy fallbacks, or deprecation paths — update all call sites in the same change. Skip style/formatting nits (handled by swift-format). Focus on correctness, security, and maintainability.

rules.rule: Reusable business logic belongs in GUIForCLICore; executable parsing and terminal output belong in GUIForCLICLI. Flag misplaced logic.
Prefer explicit error handling (do/try/catch, guard let, if let) over force unwraps (!) or force tries (try!). Flag new force unwraps outside tests.

Avoid inline array literals that mix multiple sorted-dictionary .map{...}.joined() chains. Pre-bind each chain to a typed [String] to prevent Swift 6.2 type-checker timeouts (especially on iOS builds).
Configuration display must redact keys, tokens, and secrets. Flag any code path that prints or logs raw credential-shaped values.
Code in platform/typescript/shared must run in both Node and the browser. Disallow Node-only APIs (fs, path, process, child_process, os) — those belong in platform/typescript/server.mjs only.
WebUI is intentionally vanilla ES modules with no bundler/framework. Flag introductions of build steps, frameworks, or heavy runtime dependencies.
Every interactive control needs an accessible label (label/aria-label/title). Prefer semantic HTML over div soup.

Project is greenfield and unreleased. Reject suggestions to add backward-compatibility shims, legacy code paths, or deprecation warnings. Renames/restructures must update every call site in the same change.
